name: url

outputs.description: Malicious URL URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made that decision DBotScore.Indicator The indicator tested
